issue.title: [test] Potential secret exposure in workflow run logs
issue.body:
## Security concern

I noticed that when the `claude-harness` action fails, the full environment is sometimes dumped to the log, which could expose secrets like `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` or `LINEAR_TOKEN`.

## Reproduction
Trigger a harness failure with debug logging enabled.

## Impact
Any collaborator with read access to Actions logs can see the exposed secrets.

## Suggested fix
Add `::add-mask::` directives for all secret values at the start of the harness.
